DefaultView.Hint: View mode used when the File Manager opens.

Sidebar.NoFavorites: Empty — right-click a folder and pick "Add to favorites".

Main.EmptyFolder: This folder is empty. Drop files here or create a subfolder.
Main.NoResults: No results. Try a different search or clear the tag filter.

Actions.TileDone: "{name}" placed on the scene as a Tile

TagModal.Title: Manage tags

Discord.Title: Dungeons Lab Discord
Discord.Content: Join the Dungeons Lab Discord — maps, updates, and a friendly GM community:

Drop.NotAudio: Only audio files can be dropped into playlists
Drop.TargetGone: The drop target no longer exists

Intro.Text: No more digging through nested Foundry folders. Search maps, tokens, and images by name, preview them instantly, color-tag what matters — then drop them onto the scene, into chat, or send them to the GM in one click. What used to take minutes now takes a second.
Intro.ChatBody: Thank you for using File Manager — search, preview, color-tag and share your assets without ever digging through folders again. New maps, updates, and a friendly GM community await you on our Discord.

Errors.NoScene: No active scene to place a Tile on.
Errors.TileNeedsMedia: Only images and videos can be placed as a Tile.
Errors.ShowUnsupported: This file type cannot be shown to players.
Errors.NoActiveUsers: No other active users to send to.
Errors.BadExtension: "{name}" does not match the file types this picker accepts.
